name: Lemon Topping for Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine egg yolks, sugar, butter rind, and lemon juice in the top half of a double boiler.
2. Cook over simmering water until quite thick.
3. Cool slightly.
4. Mix cornstarch with water and stir into the lemon mixture.
5. Allow to cool before spreading on cheese cakes.
